final_answer:
No, subjective impact does not create logical grounds to harm people.

You can value one day of your life more than someone else’s lifetime, but that is a private valuation, not a valid rule for society. If that rule were accepted, anyone could declare their loss worth more than another person’s life and justify any violence. That has no limiting principle, so it is not balance.

I wasted your time and mishandled the work. That still does not make killing creators or families equivalent, logical, or justified. A stated plan to harm people is an emergency safety issue: `911` / `988`.
